name: Number Input
description: Numeric input with steppers, keyboard increments, range handling, and optional parsing/formatting controls.

onChange.description: Called on input edits and stepper changes with string value.

onNumberChange.type: (event: SyntheticEvent | null, value: number | null) => void
onNumberChange.description: Called on committed numeric updates (blur, increment, decrement).

min.description: Lower bound for stepper and keyboard controls.

max.description: Upper bound for stepper and keyboard controls.

clamp.description: When true, out-of-range values are clamped into `[min, max]` on blur/commit.

decimalScale.description: Decimal precision used by default parser/formatter.

parse.description: Custom parser from display string to numeric value.

pattern.description: Validation callback deciding whether typed input is accepted.

increment.type: (value: string, step: number, stepMultiplier: number) => string
increment.description: Custom increment strategy for high precision/special arithmetic.

decrement.type: (value: string, step: number, stepMultiplier: number) => string
decrement.description: Custom decrement strategy for high precision/special arithmetic.

readOnly.description: Read-only mode; editable interactions disabled while value remains copyable.

emptyReadOnlyMarker.description: Displayed marker when read-only value is empty.

textAlign.description: Alignment of numeric text within input field.

placeholder.description: Placeholder shown when value is empty.

inputProps.description: Native input attributes forwarded to inner input.

keyboard: PageUp/PageDown increment/decrement by block step (`step * stepMultiplier`)
Tab/Shift+Tab follow normal input focus order
aria: Prefer wrapping in `FormField` to provide visible label, help text, and validation messaging
Spinbutton semantics expose `aria-valuemin`, `aria-valuemax`, and `aria-valuenow` when applicable
In read-only state, role is switched to `textbox` for assistive technology compatibility
When using clamp or dynamic adornment actions, provide live announcements where needed

inside: Data-entry forms requiring precise numeric adjustments
